programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Freeways got a new girlfriend and when her master is killed Freeway disappears with the gun -- but doesnt have it when he gets home

programme.title: Cagney Lacey
programme.desc: After witnessing a stabbing Chris becomes the target of the prepetrator who has a history of making witnesses disappear Meanwhile the NYPD brass demand stress reduction classes for the 14th Precinct

programme.title: Starsky and Hutchy
programme.desc: A series of suspicious deaths at a professional wrestling arena bring Starsky and Hutch into the squared circle a world of outsized stars misfits and greed-consumed con men

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: Hawke falls for a airplane racer in danger

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack must track down an evil statue that causes men to kill the women they love

programme.title: OPeration Repo
programme.desc: On this special season finale of Operation Repo the team gears up for a mile high repo of a lifetime! Froy and Sonia repo a water blob from a lake house but the RO and his friends refuse to let this deflate their party And with Sonias hands tied she is forced to offer Matt a position on the airplane The team takes to the skies but when plans go awry will Matt make the ultimate sacrifice for the team Or will his ego force everything to spiral violently out of control

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: In the premiere of the final season of Operation Repo the team must recover an airplane and return one-hundred thousand dollars But after two members of the team bail when its time to save the company will the others be able to bounce back in time to avoid a jail sentence

programme.title: Savage Guns
programme.desc: In Sonora in a lonesome valley near the border of Arizona ex-major Summer tries to forget about the horrors of the war of independence on his farm He has foresworn to violence His intention is put to the test when a gang of villains ravages the small town

programme.title: Daniel Boone Trailblazer
programme.desc: Daniel Boone leads settlers into Kentucky but must battle Shawnee Indians who have been persuaded by a French renegade that Boone and the settlers are there to kill them and steal their land

programme.title: Addams 220
programme.desc: Addams 220

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke convince Kate to enter a local merchants Mrs Homemaker Contest when they realize that the first prize of 50 in merchandise would almost exactly cover the cost of the new gun theyve been admiring

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke convince Kate to enter a local merchants Mrs Homemaker Contest when they realize that the first prize of 50 in merchandise would almost exactly cover the cost of the new gun theyve been admiring

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol and Wilbur convert the barn into a temporary polling precinct so Ed wants to vote too

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The wives horn in on Wilbur and Rogers duck hunting trip

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is acting deputy in Northfork while Micah is away on business When the bank is robbed Lucas shoots and seriously wounds the robber during his getaway The robber is Rudy Gray from Salinas and Lucas wires the sheriff of Salinas But the telegraph is intercepted by an unscrupulous clerk Dave Foley who decides to travel to Northfork impersonating Rudys brother to bring him back to Salinas before Lucas can find out there is a 2000 reward on his head

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A super fast black gunman who killed the 5 men the law allowed to murder his father years ago demands that deputy McCain symbolically throw his badge in the dirt

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Gunsmoke

programme.title: Gunsmoke S04E28 Wind
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S04E28 Wind

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Bonanza

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After being on the run for 6 months Richard Kimble falls in love with a beautiful woman who has a young son She also has a physically abusive estranged husband that wants Kimble out of town or dead

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A couple move into an old house that is supposedly haunted but the wife soon realizes just whos haunting the house Later another couple move into the house and form an unusual relationship with the moving man

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Painter Jack Craig gains himself a wealthy patron when he sells a morbid painting He soon finds that in order to please his patron he must continue to paint pictures of death - and this leads him down a murderous path

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Four boys find out that the local undertaker and a pharmacist are in cahoots to murder rich locals and profit from their funerals

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Loud arrogant and obnoxious criminal Trout feels a strong kinship with and develops an immediate affinity for nerdy mild-mannered and soft-spoken serial killer Wax However the close bond between these two radically contrasting lunatics falls apart after the pair pick up a brash prostitute

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Deranged Peter relentlessly stalks and terrorizes Teresa a lovely young lady who Peter thinks is his ex-wife Melissa Peter frightens Teresa out of her wits by playing a series of cruel jokes on her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick and Natalie are puzzled by the rapid aging of a murder victim

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A reporter trails a violent cult of devil worshipers calling people back from the dead

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: In this follow-up to the Prime Cut episode a group of recovering cannibals have a relapse and make the unfortunate decision to eat an intruder whos been contaminated with an alien disease

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and the Skipper construct a raft and set out to sea to find help Back on the island the remaining castaways are worried about possible headhunters

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa tries to stop a marriage-minded widow from chasing George

programme.title: Real McCoys S01E33
programme.desc: Luke wants to modernize the farm but Grampa is against change

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Both sides are kidnapping agents at such a rate that almost no one is left on either side

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max is listed as dead so he can complete a mission

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ goes from riding a rig to riding horseback when he helps a young Indian brave protect the regions wild horses from a corrupt rancher

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed feels sick with a cold so he demands that Wilbur buy a bed for him so that he can get a good nights rest

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Ed pesters Wilbur to have a will drawn up after he reads of a cat inheriting a large sum from her deceased owner

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: A new prisoner in a corporals uniform turns out to be a general with a mission for Hogan

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In a plot to get to an airplane with a silent engine Hogan gets Klink to believe that he is psychic

programme.title: Mchale 416
programme.desc: Mchale 416

programme.title: Mchales Navy
programme.desc: Ensign Charles Parker - Newly assigned to the 73 Crew as Executive Officer - Is Binghamtons last hope to tame McHale and his pirates Though Parker is unwelcome at first McHale sees potential in the young Officer and orders his Crew to shape up so that Parker wont be shipped out

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways fight over their living arrangements as a violent storm approaches the island

programme.title: Vegas
programme.desc: When a Savoy employee is busted with an underage prostitute the sheriff the FBI and the casino all make their play to get the parties to cooperate Meanwhile Dixon and Violets romance heats up

programme.title: Hart 219
programme.desc: Hart 219

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick and Joanna renew their vows - sort of Stef is Maid of Honor and George is Best Man

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: The towns snow carnival is in danger because there is no snow In desperation they turn to the only men who guaranteed snow for the carnival Larry Darryl and Darryl

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A meteor crashes onto the island The Professor soon concludes that the meteors cosmic rays are accelerating the aging process on the island and that the castaways will die of old age in one week

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Mitch Ryan and Griff investigate strange incidents in which two frozen 900-year-old Vikings arrive in Los Angeles from Iceland for thawing and they immediately come to life and restart their feud

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Tensions between Lou and Matt continue to boil when Matt enlists his daughters aid on another job

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: A new rift between Matt and the rest of the crew puts the fate of the team in question

programme.title: Captain Newman MD
programme.desc: In 1944 an Army doctor is in charge of a neuropsychiatric ward at an Army Air Corps hospital in Arizona and he must deal with a variety of tough cases

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Family friend Swamp Molly asks Bo and Luke to deliver a load of moonshine but the shipment is really illegal firearms

programme.title: Hercules 219
programme.desc: Hercules 219

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The Liberation sends a team to destroy the scarecrow probe before the Taelons crack it Joshua Doors is appointed as secretary of Human-Taelon relations

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens plan to clone a popular motivational speaker in order to control the minds of the rich and powerful Suzanne and Harrison plan to capture an alien drone

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After an eletrical explosion in his lab apparently kills Arcane our arch fiend finds himself on trial in a nightmarish comedy of his crimes against his victims

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: How will Swamp Thing deal with a man who has captured footage of him on film and the deadly creatures released into the swamp

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The Alpha Moonbase needs a rare ore known as Milgonite which is detected on an extremely dry planet Koenig leads a small landing force and discovers a glowing rock formation which comes alive and cuts off the partys links with the base It is a trap - the planet needs water to survive and has lured the travellers there for the water in their bodies

programme.title: Gamera Vs Barugon War Of The Monsters
programme.desc: After a treacherous expedition to retrieve a giant opal disaster strikes as the opal reveals itself to be an egg which spawns Barugon demon dog from Hell! Armed with a deadly tongue and cold beams Barugon wreaks havoc on Japan Gamera comes to save the day

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Hughie Hogg returns with his eye on the office of Hazzard County Sheriff He blackmails his Uncle Boss into supporting his campaign by threatening to take secretly taken photographs of his criminal activities to the FBI Coy and Vance decide to support incumbent Rosco while they collect enough evidence to derail Hughies campaign and run him out of town

programme.title: Young 321
programme.desc: Young 321

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A single girl named Barbara has a baby and is then told the baby was stillborn However she thinks it is alive and starts asking questions at the unwed mothers home where she lived

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: The IM force is tasked to prevent a rigged election in a small Latin American nation from happening and enabling the results to be genuine

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to track down the driver who hit and run with a pedestrian

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives break up a gambling ring Friday is undercover

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Stern religious people lease a Barkley farm When townspeople discover the newcomers are Mormons who practice plural marriage they plan to drive them out Jarrod hides the truth as he attempts to mediate the situation

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne working for the less than scrupulous Ben Creed as foreman crosses paths with stock owner Thora Flagg who needs help moving her herd to town She engages Creed in a poker game to win the price to cross his land and Cheyenne

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: Godzilla Vs Mechagodzilla II
programme.desc: The United Nations assembles the ultimate weapon to defeat Godzilla while scientists discover a fresh pteranodon egg on a remote Japanese island

programme.title: A Day in October
programme.desc: This story based on fact is about the movement of Danish Jews out of Denmark to neutral Sweden in the 1940s It focuses on a single family and tells of their involvement with the underground and of their own initially reluctant participation in sabotaging a munitions plant and of the daughters affection for one of the movements leaders

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: 315 the Moment of Truth
programme.desc: The Cobras a vicious street gang rule an embattled high school with their violent brand of terror But theyre headed for a showdown when an ex-gang-member-gone-good challenges their brutal reign

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 45 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features matchups between amateur debut fighters Abbas Faleh vs. Tarren Gallamore and strikers Les Bisson vs. Gerra Gossen. The last fight of the night is an exciting Lightweight pro bout between Wolfgang Janssen and Craig Shintani. You do not want to skip this one!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Kaminesky v. Damien DiMarco - HKF

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 46 opens with a rare treat: a ladies pro match between champions in differening disciplines, both looking to make their transition to MMA. Lindsay Garbatt is a former World Champion in Boxing while Valeria Mejia is a Pan-American Champion in Sambo. Following this is the main event of the evening, a challenge for the vacant Bantamweight title between Jesse Arnett and Dimitri Waardenburg! You do not want to miss this!

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Connor Hayes v. Arydas Pumputis

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Mohammed Jaraya v. Redouan Laarkoubi

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Elhadji Ndour v. Calum Robb.

programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Hard Knocks 43 continues to bring you some of the best fights in MMA! This episode features the amateur matchup of debut Kyle Messenger vs. Patrick 'Cyborg' Leblanc. Also in his amateur debut, Nick Felber faces Tyler Kobayashi. The pro card begins with Trenton Rowell vs. former Light Heavyweight and Heavyweight Amateur Champion, Devon ""Mr. Boomtruck"" Smith. Capping this show is an exciting Light Heavyweight Title Fight between Misha Cirkunov defending his title against challenger Shaun Asher. You do not want to miss it!

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: The Patriots Report
programme.desc: Christopher Price of the Boston Globe and former Patriots WR Chris Hogan bring you an inside look at the New England Patriots.

programme.title: Betting with Bearman
programme.desc: Betting with Bearman is your go-to podcast for sharper sports betting insights. Hosted by David Bearman, a 20-year veteran of the betting industry, each episode dives into the biggest games, top betting trends, and key line movements. Bearman and his guests share their top picks, best bets, leans, and stay-away plays, helping you make smarter decisions and stay ahead of the odds.

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: SEC State of Mind
programme.desc: Former SEC Player of the Year and nine-year NFL veteran Jason Campbell teams up with ESPN reporter Taylor Davis on SEC State of Mind. With experience from the field to the booth to the sideline, they bring fresh insight and access while covering the entire Southeastern Conference.

programme.title: Bleav In Falcons
programme.desc: Bleav in Falcons is hosted by former Falcons fullback Ovie Mughelli, a two-time Pro Bowler and standout running Michael Turner, a two-time All-Pro and Pro Bowler, was a standout running back for the Falcons and providing expert insights and in-depth coverage of the Atlanta Falcons.

programme.title: Irish Breakdown
programme.desc: Irish Breakdown provides unmatched in-depth analysis of the Notre Dame Football program while also discussing hot college football topics.

programme.title: Bleav In Rams
programme.desc: Bleav in Rams brings you the Rams' insight and access that only they can. We provide in-depth analysis on Matthew Stafford, Cooper Kupp, Puka Nacua and the rest of the Los Angeles Rams squad hosted by Erin Coscarelli and Tyler Dragon

programme.title: Bleav in Oregon
programme.desc: Bleav in Oregon takes an insider’s look at the world of Oregon Ducks sports With hosts Jonathan Stewart and Zachary Neel. We get an in-depth look at the world of Oregon football and recruiting with a Ducks reporter and University of Oregon alum.

programme.title: Bleav in Broncos
programme.desc: Denver Broncos insiders Patrick Chiotti and Bri Maestas bring you everything you need to know about the team at Mile High. Get insight and analysis on Bo Nix, Patrick Surtain II, Javonte Williams, and the entire Broncos squad. Tune in for recaps, previews, and guest interviews.

programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce and Herc land the barge on a planet with incredibly huge plants Saw Boss is sending vines to grow there and Jayce must stop them But Jayce Gillian and Herc are captured by warrior crusaders Oon stumbles into the castle where they are being held and accidentally removes the shield from the stone making him the new leader Everyone joins together to rid the planet of monster minds The crusaders learn that not all intruders are enemies; some are friends

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jayce is led to an abandoned ship by a signal from his father Jayce finds his father has left a message for him but he needs more power from the Pride to receive the coordinates of his fathers destination A self-destruct mechanism is activated and Jayce must work quickly to get the message while battling monster minds They get away with only seconds to spare

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Two boys find a mock-up of a Space Shuttle in the Everglades VENOM is after the actual thing Alex Sector takes over as MASK leader after Matt Trakker is bitten by a snake

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD have stolen the national treasure of Ireland the Blarney Stone and sends Gadget to retrieve it

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to Romanavia to retrieve the royal seal that has been stolen by MAD

programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue
